title: FrameDiff Framework Data Schema
description: Schema for all compliance framework version comparison data files in FrameDiff

id.description: Unique framework identifier. Lowercase, hyphenated. Matches the folder name in data/frameworks/.

name.description: Full official name of the framework
examples: Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard

shortName.description: Abbreviated name used in the UI sidebar and headers

description.description: 1-2 sentence description of the framework shown in the sidebar tooltip

copyright.description: Copyright status. public-domain = full text OK. restricted-summary-only = show change summaries but not full control text. restricted-metadata-only = show only structural/count changes, link to official source.

showFullText.description: If false, the UI shows a restricted content banner and hides oldText/newText fields

source.description: Official framework homepage or primary source URL

officialChangelogUrl.description: Direct URL to official change documentation (summary of changes PDF, GitHub repo, etc.)

lastDataUpdate.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) when this JSON file was last updated

versions.description: All tracked versions in chronological order

latestVersion.description: The current/most recent version string. Must be present in the versions array.

sunset.description: Present only if this framework version has been officially retired or superseded

transitions.description: Keys are version-pair strings in format '{fromVersion}-to-{toVersion}'. Each value is a Transition object.

totalFrom.description: Total control/requirement count in source version

totalTo.description: Total control/requirement count in destination version

highlights.description: 3-6 plain-English bullets describing the most important changes in this transition

type.description: Nature of the change. added=new control/requirement. removed=eliminated. modified=content changed. restructured=moved/renumbered, same content. renamed=ID or name changed, content same.

category.description: Freeform category for grouping related changes within a transition

old.description: Control ID in the source version. null if new.

new.description: Control ID in the destination version. null if removed.

stigCheckId.description: STIG-specific: the Rule ID (SV-######r######_rule format). Only present for STIG data.

title.description: Short human-readable name for this change. Used in the compact list view.

area.description: The section/function/domain/clause this change belongs to. Framework-specific.

oldText.description: Full control/requirement text from source version. null if: new control, removed control, or copyright restricts display.

newText.description: Full control/requirement text from destination version. null if: removed control, or copyright restricts display.

rationale.description: Why this change was made — from official documentation or best interpretation. Helps users understand intent, not just the change itself.

significance.description: Impact level. high=meaningfully affects compliance posture or requires action. medium=notable but limited scope. low=clarification or minor edit.

tags.description: Free-form tags for filtering. Use consistent tag names across frameworks.
